selected_candidate:
Phantoscope Memory Foam Pillow for Sleeping, Shredded Memory Foam Pillow Cooling Gel for Hot Sleepers, Adjustable Firm Bed Pillows with Bamboo Cover & Cotton Cover, King Size, 1 Pack, Gift Package
constraint_evidence:
- bamboo memory foam pillow: supported (title/action context includes “Bamboo Cover” and “Memory Foam”)
- washable cover: supported (left filter “Washable” is checked; title mentions cover types but not washable directly)
- king size: supported (action label/title context says “King Size”; page query is king size pillow; visible “Options: 3 sizes”)
- available on Amazon: supported (Amazon results page)
- product is a pillow: supported (visible title and image)
- price visible: supported (VND 964,514)
- rating visible: supported (4.3 stars, 1.1K reviews)
action_target:
Click the Phantoscope product result title/span.
success_signals:
Product detail page opens for the Phantoscope pillow, ideally showing king size and washable/bamboo cover options.
failure_signals:
Wrong product opens, click miss
